description_long: This is a dark brown bust sculpture depicting a human head and upper torso, mounted on a rectangular plinth. The figure has a smooth, bald head, prominent cheekbones, and defined facial features including deep-set eyes, a straight nose, and closed lips. The bust is rendered with realistic anatomical proportions, and the surface appears to have a matte, slightly rough finish, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The base is solid and blocky, providing stability and a sense of permanence. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or decorative embellishments on the sculpture. The overall appearance is classical and dignified, suitable for display in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A dark brown, realistic bust of a human head and upper torso on a rectangular plinth, with smooth, defined facial features and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Right side view showing the profile of the head, ear, and the curvature of the neck and shoulders.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical facial features, closed eyes, and the full shape of the bust and plinth.
description_view_2: Left rear three-quarter view displaying the back of the head, ear, and the transition from neck to shoulders.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the smooth, rounded back of the head and the solid plinth base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background and surroundings are not shown.
